languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web also speaks to its departed brothers and sisters. But the answer we receive is the silence granted by the Undying One."

languages.text: "В Кровавой паутине тоже говорят со своими ушедшими братьями и сестрами. Однако ответом нам всегда служит молчание, дарованное {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающим{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "В Кровавой паутине тоже говорят со своими ушедшими братьями и сестрами. Однако ответом нам всегда служит молчание, дарованное {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающим{/g}."
traits.speaker: KibellahCompanion

languages.text: "The Bloodspun Web also speaks to its departed brothers and sisters. But the answer we receive is the silence granted by the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}."

languages.text: «La Red Sanguinolenta también habla con los hermanos a los que hemos perdido, pero nuestra respuesta es el silencio otorgado por el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Inmortal{/g}».
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web also speaks to its departed brothers and sisters. But the answer we receive is the silence granted by the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «La Red Sanguinolenta también habla con los hermanos a los que hemos perdido, pero nuestra respuesta es el silencio otorgado por el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Inmortal{/g}».

languages.text: “织血罗网也对逝去的兄弟姐妹说话。但我们得到的唯一回应，只有{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不死之神{/g}赐予的沉默。”
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web also speaks to its departed brothers and sisters. But the answer we receive is the silence granted by the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “织血罗网也对逝去的兄弟姐妹说话。但我们得到的唯一回应，只有{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不死之神{/g}赐予的沉默。”

languages.text: « Au sein de la Toile de Sang, nous parlons nous aussi aux frères et aux sœurs que nous avons perdus, mais nous recevons pour seule réponse le silence accordé par l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Immortel{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web also speaks to its departed brothers and sisters. But the answer we receive is the silence granted by the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}."

traits.locale_text: « Au sein de la Toile de Sang, nous parlons nous aussi aux frères et aux sœurs que nous avons perdus, mais nous recevons pour seule réponse le silence accordé par l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Immortel{/g}. »

languages.text: "Kanipi Ağı, ayrılan kardeşleriyle de görüşür. Ancak aldığımız cevap, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Ölmeyen{/g}'in bahşettiği sessizliktir."
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web also speaks to its departed brothers and sisters. But the answer we receive is the silence granted by the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Kanipi Ağı, ayrılan kardeşleriyle de görüşür. Ancak aldığımız cevap, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Ölmeyen{/g}'in bahşettiği sessizliktir."

languages.text: "Auch das Blutgesponnene Netz spricht mit seinen verstorbenen Brüdern und Schwestern. Aber die Antwort, die wir erhalten, ist die vom {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Todlosen{/g} gewährte Stille."
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web also speaks to its departed brothers and sisters. But the answer we receive is the silence granted by the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Auch das Blutgesponnene Netz spricht mit seinen verstorbenen Brüdern und Schwestern. Aber die Antwort, die wir erhalten, ist die vom {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Todlosen{/g} gewährte Stille."

languages.text: "ブラッドスパン・ウェブは、亡き兄弟姉妹にも語りかける。しかし、我々が受け取る答えは、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不滅の者{/g} によって与えられた沈黙である。"
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web also speaks to its departed brothers and sisters. But the answer we receive is the silence granted by the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}."
